caption: A woman with shoulder-length brown hair and glasses, wearing a blue top and a white cardigan with a blue floral pattern, stands in a craft room. The room is filled with supplies, including shelves of colorful ink pads, ink bottles, and a pair of scissors hanging on the wall. She works at a white table where a paper trimmer, cardstock, and a small white device are placed. Across several frames, she moves from gesturing with her hands while speaking to focusing on the materials on the table. She uses the paper trimmer to cut a piece of patterned green and yellow paper. In three of the frames, the white text "72 cards!" is visible on the wall behind her. As the sequence progresses, she shifts from an open, communicative posture to leaning over the table to precisely align and cut her crafting materials.
